subject.description: Person from behind, back to camera, facing a clean white wall covered with four printed ad creative mockups pinned side by side. One mockup has a bold hand-drawn red circle around it. The person is close to the wall.
subject.action: Standing close to the wall, looking at the mockups. Back fully to camera.

setting.location: Clean white wall — no windows, no room edges visible. Only the wall fills the background. Four mockups pinned to it, evenly spaced. Real environment, slight wall texture.
setting.time_of_day: Soft even indoor light. No window visible in the frame.

composition.framing: Close-up. Person from waist up fills the lower foreground, back to camera. Wall and all four mockups fill the upper two-thirds. No windows, no room edges — just person and wall. Tight, editorial.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: medium shallow — person sharp, wall and mockups slightly soft but readable

lighting.type: Soft natural daylight from window left — clean, even, editorial. No harsh shadows.
lighting.color_grading: Clean, slightly warm neutral — daylight whites, natural skin tones, no heavy grade. Editorial magazine feel.

mood: Decisive and analytical. The moment of evaluation — not stressed, focused. The circled mockup suggests a winner has been identified.
aesthetic_style: 8K ultra realistic, hyper realistic photorealism. Shot on Sony A7 IV, 35mm f/2.0. Feels like a still from a brand documentary or editorial shoot. NOT posed, NOT stock, NOT studio, NOT looking at camera.
